Tushar Lab

Our Team

A growing group of researchers committed to rigorous, impactful science at the intersection of physics and AI.

Principal Investigator

FIT

Fakrul Islam Tushar

Assistant Professor, Department of Medical Imaging

University of Arizona

Dr. Tushar is a computational medical imaging researcher specializing in virtual imaging trials, digital human phantoms, and deep learning for radiology AI. He completed his PhD at Duke University's Center for Virtual Imaging Trials (CVIT) under Dr. Joseph Lo.

Virtual Imaging TrialsCT SimulationFoundation ModelsMedical AI
✉ ftushar@arizona.edu ⌥ GitHub ↗

Join Us

We're building the team

The lab is actively recruiting PhD students, postdocs, and research assistants. We welcome candidates with backgrounds in medical imaging, deep learning, or computational physics.
